description_long: This is a vertical metal post with a rectangular sign mounted on top, designed for motorcycle parking. The sign is made of brushed metal and features red text that reads 'Motorcycle Parking Only' with a motorcycle icon, and a humorous warning below: 'THE LAST CAR THAT PARKED HERE IS STILL MISSING.' The post is cylindrical, with the upper half painted red and the lower half showing a weathered metallic finish, possibly from exposure to the elements. The sign is attached securely to the post and is clearly visible from the front, making it easy for riders to identify the designated parking area. There are no visible ground markings or wheel locking mechanisms associated with this object. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for outdoor urban environments such as sidewalks or parking lots.
description: A sturdy metal post with a red-and-silver finish supports a rectangular sign designating motorcycle parking, featuring bold red text and a motorcycle icon.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical post and the thin profile of the rectangular sign mounted on top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full sign with red text and motorcycle icon, clearly indicating motorcycle parking only.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the post and the thin edge of the sign, with no additional features visible.
description_view_3: Rear view of the sign and post, with the text on the sign visible in reverse and no additional markings or features.
